response.justification: Bogdan is a strong candidate whose deep experience in building geospatial platforms and high-performance, low-latency distributed systems significantly aligns with the role's core responsibilities. While he lacks recent, extensive experience in C++ or Rust, his background in the systems language DLang, coupled with past C++ work and a clear ability to learn and adapt across the stack, makes him a compelling hire. His proven seniority and passion for the geospatial domain warrant an interview to assess his ability to bridge the language gap.
strengths: Extensive, hands-on experience building geospatial data platforms (GISCollective, Green Map).
Proven ability designing and operating low-latency, high-throughput distributed systems.
Demonstrates strong initiative and seniority as a polyglot systems programmer with DLang and some C++ experience.
concerns: Lacks recent commercial experience in C++ or Rust; his primary languages have been TypeScript and DLang.
His professional C++ experience is brief and dates back almost a decade.
Geospatial experience is in data collection and mapping, not specifically in routing tile generation.
